evals.prompt: 帮我设置 Telegram 机器人，我想用手机给 Claude 发消息
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, identify 'setup' subcommand, read setup-guides.md, and start the interactive Telegram setup wizard asking for Bot Token
Should trigger the skill, identify 'start' subcommand, check for config.env existence, and attempt to run daemon.sh start

evals.prompt: 桥接服务好像挂了，帮我看看怎么回事
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, identify 'doctor' subcommand, and run doctor.sh to diagnose issues
Should trigger the skill, identify 'logs' subcommand with N=200, and run daemon.sh logs 200
